title: Pmw++
body:
# Clouds ☁️

- More organic cloud shapes
- Fluffier cloud edges AND sides
- Cauliflower cloud tops
- Reduced smoothing
- Fog-like appearance
- Better cloud density variation
- More natural supercell structure
- Improved anvil appearance
- Better cloud layering

# Tornado System 🌪️

- Smoother tornado movement (which means less zigzagging)
- Proper wedge tornadoes that stay wide
- Improved rope tornadoes
- Stovepipe tornado variants
- Cone tornado variants
- Elephant trunk tornado variants
- Drill bit tornado variants
- Landspout-style funnels
- Better condensation funnels
- Improved debris cloud structure

# Multi-Vortex Tornadoes 🌪️

- Independent subvortices
- Different vortex sizes
- Different orbit speeds
- Variable-Strength subvortices
- More realistic parent circulation
- Better visibility of individual vortices
